title: Kimchi Crunchie Grilled Cheese
description: A spicy twist on the classic grilled cheese sandwich, featuring kimchi and crunchy texture from the crunchie.
instructions: Preheat a grill pan or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of two slices of bread.
Place one slice of bread, butter side down, in the pan.
Top with a slice of cheese, a spoonful of kimchi, and some crushed crunchie.
Place the second slice of bread, butter side up, on top.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Flip the sandwich over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
Optional: Add some sliced vegetables, such as cucumbers or bell peppers, for added nutrition and flavor.
